expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets the focus and provides explicit phase4a scenario leaves for SDK/API-visible outcomes: “Expectation: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios.” and examples such as “Verify the opened window title equals the selected report’s name/context (exact match)” plus “Verify the title is human-readable (not an internal token like `newReportWithApplication`).”

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md assert and demonstrate phase4a alignment: execution_notes.md: “Primary phase under test: phase4a.” result.md: “Primary checkpoint under test — Phase: phase4a (subcategory-only draft)” and “These examples adhere to `references/phase4a-contract.md` requirements: Subcategory-only… Atomic nested steps… Observable verification leaves.”
